chapter_title.en: The Rules of Forgetfulness (sahw) in Prayer

text: 989 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: «إِذَا كَثُرَ عَلَيْكَ اَلسَّهْوُ فَدَعْهُ فَإِنَّهُ يُوشِكُ أَنْ يَدَعَكَ إِنَّمَا هُوَ مِنَ اَلشَّيْطَانِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.989 - Muhammad ibn Muslim narrated from Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) who said:
"If you experience frequent distraction (waswasah), ignore it, for it will soon leave you. It is only from Satan”.
